summary: Add or remove items in custom watchlists. Body is an object keyed by list_id -> array of {object_id (instrument UUID, NOT ticker), object_type (instrument|currency_pair|option_strategy), operation (create=add | delete=remove)}. Batches multiple items and multiple lists in one call. Reversible (add/remove items; not destructive like deleting a list).
source: cdp-2026-06-14 watchlist-capture (verified live: add+remove each returned 200; the REAL endpoint is discovery/lists/items/, NOT midlands/lists/items/)

summary: Rename/edit (PATCH) or delete (DELETE) a watchlist. PATCH body uses display_name (NOT name) and optional icon_emoji.
Create a watchlist. Body uses display_name (NOT name), optional icon_emoji and object_type.
Resume/pause a recurring buy (PATCH {"state":"active"} to resume, {"state":"paused"} to pause) or DELETE it. Resume/pause reversible; DELETE is not.
note: VERIFIED 2026-05-29: PATCH {"state":"active"} resumes (200, next_investment_date populates); state field round-trips. DELETE unverified.
inferred 2026-05-29: body shape unverified, confirm via live capture before trusting

summary: Get one recurring schedule (state, next_investment_date, amount).
Global instrument search (web search bar) — resolve name/theme to tickers.
Account-wide DRIP state {drip_enabled}. PATCH {"drip_enabled":bool} to toggle (write-mutate).
Per-instrument DRIP settings list for an account (results[]).
Margin/PDT settings {leverage,day_trades,advanced_buying_power}. PUT {"day_trades_protection":bool} for PDT protection (write-mutate).
High-yield cash sweep state {sweep_enrolled}. POST {"sweep_enrollment_action":"unenroll"} to disable (write-mutate).
Enroll high-yield cash sweep. POST {"account_number":"..."} (pairs with an agreements/v2/sign).
Sign a Robinhood agreement. POST {agreement_id,sha256}. Used by enroll flows.
Server-side options order REVIEW/validation, no placement. Multi-leg body {account,direction,legs[{option,position_effect,ratio_quantity,side}],client_ask/bid_at_submission,form_source}.
Options order marketability check, no placement. Same multi-leg body as review.
Stock Lending Income Program (SLIP) status for an account {is_enabled,was_ever_enabled}. PUT {"account_number":..,"is_enabled":bool,"was_ever_enabled":bool} to toggle (write-mutate).
